ddls:
CREATE TABLE "emails" (
  "email_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each email */,
  "mail_to" TEXT /* Recipient email address */,
  "sender_name" TEXT /* Name of the sender */,
  "mail_from" TEXT /* Sender email address */,
  "receipt_name" TEXT /* Name of the recipient */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject of the email */,
  "body" TEXT /* Body content of the email */,
  "msg_date" TEXT /* Date the email was sent or received */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the email (e.g., sales, marketing) */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for easy searching and filtering */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the email (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "notification_sent" INTEGER /* Whether a notification was sent to the user */,
  "thread_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the email thread */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Compliance status with data protection regulations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("email_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emails_mail_from FOREIGN KEY ("mail_from") REFERENCES users ("email"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emails_thread_id FOREIGN KEY ("thread_id") REFERENCES threads ("thread_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emails_mail_to FOREIGN KEY ("mail_to") REFERENCES users ("email")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., employee, client, partner) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attachments" (
  "attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attachment */,
  "email_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the email */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the attachment file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the attachment file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attachment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attachments_email_id FOREIGN KEY ("email_id") REFERENCES emails ("email_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "email_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "email_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the email */,
  "open_date" TEXT /* Date the email was opened */,
  "click_date" TEXT /* Date the email was clicked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_email_activity_email_id FOREIGN KEY ("email_id") REFERENCES emails ("email_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "threads" (
  "thread_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each thread */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject of the thread */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("thread_id")
)
column_names: Date the email was sent or received
Category of the email (e.g., sales, marketing)
Tags for easy searching and filtering
Priority of the email (e.g., low, medium, high)
Whether a notification was sent to the user
Unique identifier for the email thread
Compliance status with data protection regulations
Role of the user (e.g., employee, client, partner)
